briefs.title: WorkSafeBC Updates Helmet and Respirator Safety Standards — Two Deadlines to Know
briefs.summary: BC's workplace safety rules are being updated in two stages: respirator (breathing protection) standards upgrade to a newer CSA version, and new rules around combustible dust and compressed air take effect in 2027.
briefs.action_required: Audit your helmets and respirators now to confirm they meet the updated standards before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC helmet and respirator standard updates take effect — BC OHS Regulation
WorkSafeBC combustible dust and compressed air rules take effect — BC OHS Regulation

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Natural Resources, Labour & Employment
